title: Method Level 2
summary: Expanded positions, 3/4 time, eighth-note melodies, and wider hand ranges building on Level 1.

exercises.title: D Position Steps
exercises.summary: Five-note reading from D4 with one sharp.
exercises.goal: Navigate the D position with F-sharp.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Position Bass
exercises.summary: Left hand D position in bass clef.
exercises.goal: Read D-position notes in bass clef.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Eighth Note Walk
exercises.summary: Continuous eighth notes through the C five-finger position.
exercises.goal: Keep eighth notes even and steady.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.
Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass Waltz
exercises.summary: Three-four time in the left hand.
exercises.goal: Count three beats per measure in bass clef.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Position Intro
exercises.summary: Right hand reading from G4 to D5.
exercises.goal: Shift hand position to G and read fluently.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Position Bass
exercises.summary: Left hand G position in bass clef.
exercises.goal: Read the G five-finger position in bass clef.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Skip and Step Mix
exercises.goal: Recognize and play steps vs skips in sequence.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Mixed Values Melody
exercises.summary: Halves, quarters, and eighths in one piece.
exercises.goal: Switch note lengths smoothly within a phrase.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Walk
exercises.summary: Left hand reading through the A minor five-finger pattern.
exercises.goal: Play the natural minor position in bass clef.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Echo Octaves
exercises.summary: A phrase in treble then echoed an octave lower.
exercises.goal: Read identical patterns at different octave heights.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Waltz Melody
exercises.summary: A flowing melody in three-four time.
exercises.goal: Phrase a waltz melody with a three-beat lilt.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Eighth Bass Line
exercises.summary: Eighth note motion in the left hand.
exercises.goal: Keep a smooth eighth-note bass line.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Level Two Review
exercises.summary: G position melody combining all Level 2 rhythms.
exercises.goal: Apply G position and varied note values in one piece.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Level Two Finale
exercises.summary: A complete ascending and descending run using all Level 2 positions.
exercises.goal: Read fluently across C, G, and D positions.
